Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[], ref IPoint[])

Defines the best projective transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

virtual void DefineFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[] fromPoints, ref IPoint[] toPoints)

Parameters

fromPoints IPoint[]
toPoints IPoint[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineFromControlPoints(int, ref IPoint, ref IPoint)

Defines the best projective transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

virtual void DefineFromControlPoints(int numPoints, ref IPoint fromPoints, ref IPoint toPoints)

Parameters

numPoints int
fromPoints IPoint
toPoints IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineFromControlPointsEx(int, ref WKSPoint, ref WKSPoint) 

virtual void DefineFromControlPointsEx(int numPoints, ref WKSPoint fromPoints, ref WKSPoint toPoints)

Parameters

numPoints int
fromPoints WKSPoint
toPoints WKSPoint

GetControlPointError(int, ref double, ref double)

Returns the errors involved in moving control point i from the 'from' to 'to' system. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

virtual void GetControlPointError(int i, ref double fromError, ref double toError)

Parameters

i int
fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetRMSError(ref double, ref double)

RMS (Root Mean Square) error expressed relative to the 'from' and 'to' points defining the transformation. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

virtual void GetRMSError(ref double fromError, ref double toError)

Parameters

fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

IProjectiveTransformation2DGEN_TransformMeasuresFF(esriTransformDirection, ref double[], ref double[])

Transforms floating point measures to floating point measures (or do the inverse).

virtual void IProjectiveTransformation2DGEN_TransformMeasuresFF(esriTransformDirection Direction, ref double[] inMeasures, ref double[] outMeasures)

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
inMeasures double[]
outMeasures double[]

QueryTransformationParameters(esriTransformDirection, ref double)

Returns the eight parameters which define the two dimensional projective transformation.

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
params double

Sample Snippet

SetTransformationParameters(esriTransformDirection, ref double)

Sets the eight parameters which define the two dimensional projective transformation.

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
params double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetTransformationParameters(esriTransformDirection, ref double[])

Sets the eight parameters which define the two dimensional projective transformation. The size of the incoming parameter array needs to be 8.

virtual void SetTransformationParameters(esriTransformDirection Direction, ref double[] @params)

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
params double[]
